description: MFRs we cannot buy through franchise distribution. API data is still captured (chuboe_pricing_api_result) for market intel, but VQs are NOT written, and RFQ enrichment runs these lines LAST so quota-limited APIs (DigiKey 1000/day etc.) spend budget on actionable parts first.

restricted_mfrs.notes: Acquired Linear Tech (2017) and Maxim (2021). Listed independently below for explicit match.
Rolled into ADI 2021. Matches MAX* and DS* MPN prefixes — but use MFR match, not prefix.
Rolled into ADI 2017. Matches LT*/LTC* MPN prefixes — but use MFR match, not prefix.
TI Store (manufacturer-direct) is NOT in the franchise-api distributor list, so this rule does not affect TI Store VQs (e.g., 2134141/2134142).
